verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There's a love that's already given There's a Grace that I could not earn You pour out mercy Morning by morning Your goodness follows me all of my days

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: What do I have that hasn't been given What do I need that you don't supply You clothe the lily You feed the sparrow They do not worry So neither will I

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You are faithful God You are faithful God You are faithful God You are faithful God

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Oh, I don't have to be afraid anymore Oh, I don't have to be afraid anymore
